title: Portfolio (this site)
description: Static Next.js export, Tailwind CSS v4, Docker + Caddy on a Hetzner VM. Content-driven JSON for projects and skills.

title: Invoice Creator
description: German freelancer–focused invoicing: drafts → finalize → PDF on Vercel Blob → email via Resend → Stripe Checkout → reminder cron jobs.

title: TripRender App
description: Mono-repo: Expo app with WebView Mapbox map and AWS backend that renders trip GeoJSON to MP4 via Remotion Lambda; download to device or web.

title: DrinkWater
description: Water intake MVP: daily goal, glass logging (AsyncStorage), SVG progress ring, and repeating local notifications with expo-notifications.

title: HabitTracker
description: Cross-platform habit tracking with charts (react-native-chart-kit), Expo Router, Reanimated, and EAS dev builds.

title: SwipeStocks
description: Expo finance-style app with Firebase, Zustand, React Native Paper, gesture + reanimated stacks, MMKV, and Jest/Testing Library.

title: TripRender (Mapbox route SPA)
description: Single-page driving directions: place A to B on a Mapbox map; static build with token injection, deployable to GitHub Pages or Netlify.

title: ControlMe
description: Multi-tenant SaaS template: Next.js App Router, Supabase, billing (Stripe/Lemon Squeezy), i18n, feature packages in a Turborepo; Playwright E2E.

title: Ondojo
description: Large Expo app on AWS Amplify: AppSync/GraphQL, many Lambda functions, EAS CI for TestFlight/production, Jest + Maestro E2E, analytics integrations.

title: Mobile Battlegrounds
description: Mobile card battle game: React Native (Expo), Firebase Auth & Firestore, Cloud Functions, Zustand state.

title: StreamApp
description: Twitch-inspired Expo MVP: stream feed, categories, and native video playback with Expo Video and React Navigation.
